ai.title: Talk with the AI about projects, writing, implementation choices, and working style
ai.description: This assistant works more like an on-site conversation partner. It can answer questions about projects, writing, and the AI experiments here, and it can also organize dense information into clearer visual summaries.
ai.textModeDescription: Ask about experience, skills, project choices, engineering approach, or why something was built a certain way.
ai.imageModeDescription: Upload a screenshot from this site or a related artifact and ask for portfolio-specific explanation or feedback.
ai.textPromptPlaceholder: Ask about project context, technical choices, interface details, article ideas, or what Jie is exploring lately...
ai.imagePromptPlaceholder: Explain what the screenshot shows and what you want to know about Jie's work or this portfolio...
ai.imageHelp: Use a portfolio screenshot, UI fragment, or related visual reference.
ai.textHint: Best for project, implementation, and process-oriented questions.
ai.imageHint: Best for discussing portfolio visuals or implementation from screenshots.
ai.compactDescription: Projects, writing, implementation, and working style
ai.landingPromptHint: Or type your own question below
ai.shortcutHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
ai.slowRequest: Response is slow — you can keep waiting or cancel
ai.verySlowRequest: Model is busy, waiting for response...
ai.empty: You can ask about projects, writing, interface details, or technical tradeoffs. If it helps, the assistant can also turn dense answers into cleaner cards, timelines, or comparison tables.
ai.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while contacting the assistant.
ai.errorInputTooLong: Input is too long. Please shorten it before sending.
ai.errorConversationBusy: This conversation is still generating. Please wait a moment.
ai.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
ai.errorServiceUnavailable: AI service is busy. Please try again later.
ai.workspaceEmptyHint: Ask the AI to generate a project grid, timeline, or comparison table. Results will appear here.
ai.artifactPendingAppend: Preparing a new {artifact} for this thread.
ai.clearWorkspaceConfirm: Clear all artifacts in this workspace? Existing chat messages will stay.

hero.name: Jie
hero.shortIntro: I build production-ready web apps and AI product features with React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis, and LLM APIs.
hero.landingTitle1: I'm Jie, a full-stack TypeScript developer based in Hangzhou, China.
hero.landingTitle2: I build production-ready web apps and AI product features with React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis, and LLM APIs.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.description: Projects I've contributed to or led, spanning financial systems, e-commerce platforms, and AI applications.

stateStreet.roleTitle: Frontend Developer at State Street Corporation
stateStreet.description: Worked across two internal State Street initiatives: modernizing a legacy trading platform and building an AI-powered UX Agent for product teams. The scope spanned frontend architecture, dashboard interaction patterns, design-system migration, and agent-assisted page generation.
stateStreet.highlight1: Split a legacy trading monolith into 5+ independently deployable domains with Module Federation
stateStreet.highlight2: Built a draggable dashboard with unified request handling, responsive persistence, and solid unit test coverage
stateStreet.highlight3: Created a UX Agent that turns natural-language product specs into spec-compliant React pages
stateStreet.highlight4: Shipped migration and orchestration tooling to modernize 50+ custom components alongside the existing system

financial.title: Trading Management System · State Street Corporation
financial.description: Rebuilt the frontend architecture of State Street's B2B trading platform — breaking a legacy monolith into independently deployable domains, and shipping a drag-and-drop data dashboard with unified request handling and robust test coverage.
financial.highlight1: Webpack Module Federation splitting 5+ domains for independent dev and deploy
financial.highlight2: Draggable Monitor/Dashboard with responsive layout and local persistence
financial.highlight3: Vitest + React Testing Library for decoupled, high-coverage unit testing

uxAgent.title: UX Agent · State Street Corporation
uxAgent.description: Built an AI-powered UX Agent that lets product managers generate spec-compliant React pages from natural language descriptions. Also engineered a component library migration pipeline and an agent orchestration platform for the team.
uxAgent.highlight1: GitHub Copilot custom paradigm constraints + CLI scaffold + preset templates for consistent AI output
uxAgent.highlight2: Runtime wrapper compatibility layer exposing legacy API with zero caller changes for parallel library coexistence
uxAgent.highlight3: AI-powered batch migration of 50+ custom components to MUI with seamless progressive replacement

aiChat.title: AI Agent Chat Application
aiChat.description: Full-stack conversational assistant built on the OpenAI API — supporting multi-turn context, autonomous tool-calling, and real-time generative UI.
aiChat.highlight1: ToolLoopAgent architecture for multi-turn autonomous tool-calling
aiChat.highlight2: SSE streaming + generative UI for real-time structured component rendering
aiChat.highlight3: 3-tier Redis rate-limiting with thread-level concurrency lock

map.titleLoading: Let me guess how far you are from me
map.titleReady: I’m from Hangzhou, China roughly {distance} km away from your current location, according to your IP address.
map.titleUnavailable: Distance calculator is taking a nap
map.bodyLoading: Drawing a line from your location back to Hangzhou. Give me a moment and I'll tell you how many kilometers separate us.
map.bodyReady: I’m from Hangzhou, China roughly {distance} km away from your current location, according to your IP address.
map.bodyUnavailable: Right now I can't tell how far apart we are, but think of it as a little suspense — when it wakes up, it will show the distance between us.
map.mapAriaReady: Approximate map from {visitor} to Hangzhou, China
map.mapAriaLoading: Loading approximate visitor route to Hangzhou, China
map.mapAriaUnavailable: Approximate visitor route unavailable; Hangzhou location remains visible

pronunciation.name: Jie
pronunciation.body: Think of it as a clean "jee" followed by a quick "eh". Short, light, and easy to repeat once you've heard it.
pronunciation.breakdownValue: Start with "jee", then let the ending fall off softly.
pronunciation.hint: Click to hear a robot say it.

flag.title: I am from big, sunny Dali, China.
flag.linkLabel: Click here to know my hometown
flag.ariaLabel: Animated People's Republic of China flag waving in staggered columns
flag.motionValue: It's already gently waving when you open the page

volunteerTurkey.title: I once do volunteer in Turkey
volunteerTurkey.body: I love backpacking. I once traveled to Istanbul, Turkey and spent two weeks volunteering on a local farm and make friends.
volunteerTurkey.image1Alt: Jie harvesting small tomatoes while volunteering in Turkey
volunteerTurkey.image2Alt: Jie with new friends during his backpacking trip in Turkey
volunteerTurkey.listIntro: A few favorite memories from that trip
volunteerTurkey.highlight1: Backpacking through Istanbul and seeing the city beyond the usual tourist path
volunteerTurkey.highlight2: Spending time volunteering on a local farm and joining everyday life there
volunteerTurkey.highlight3: Meeting warm local friends who made the trip feel personal and unforgettable

emergencyExitCoding.title: I once ended up coding in an emergency stairwell
emergencyExitCoding.imageAlt: Jie sitting on emergency exit stairs with laptops and chargers while trying to code

financial.summary: the trading platform rewrite, helping split an old system into independently updatable parts and building a free-form dashboard you can drag and drop.

uxAgent.summary: an internal design assistant that turns product ideas into page code. I also built the bridge that let old and new systems run side by side without breaking anything.

blogs.mdxListDescription: MDX notes for long-form writing, custom components, and interactive reading experiments.

article.fanDescription: I enjoy building weird stuff with code. A few months ago, I made this anti-dislike wind generator that literally blows the dislike button away from your cursor. It’s just for fun — not a dictatorship, I promise.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Interested in working together? Fill in a few details below and let AI help you draft a professional email to Jie. You can edit it before sending.
contact.infoHint: Fill in what you can — AI will handle the rest.
contact.customPromptLabel: What would you like to say?
contact.customPromptPlaceholder: Tell Jie what brings you here — the more context, the better the AI-generated email will be...
